message:
Implement Kafka deterministic producer/consumer lifecycle (T6.8)

Replace all Phase 0 stub errors in the Kafka producer and consumer with
working implementations:

Producer: send(), send_with_headers(), and flush() now dispatch to
rdkafka when the kafka feature is enabled, or return deterministic
metadata (auto-incrementing offsets per topic/partition) in non-kafka
builds. Adds topic validation rejecting blank names.

Consumer: KafkaConsumer gains a full deterministic state machine
tracking subscriptions, partition assignments, committed offsets, and
seek positions. subscribe() deduplicates and auto-assigns partition 0
per topic. commit_offsets() and seek() validate topic membership and
non-negative offsets. close() is idempotent and blocks subsequent
operations. New accessor methods (subscriptions, assigned_partitions,
committed_offset, position, is_closed) expose internal state.

All producer and consumer code paths gate through cx.checkpoint() for
cancel-correctness. DeliverySender::complete() refactored for
wake-outside-lock safety.

Adds unit tests for deterministic delivery metadata, blank topic
rejection, subscribe/commit/seek lifecycle, close idempotency, and
an E2E integration test for the full consumer lifecycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
